description: Book digitized by Google from the library of University of California and uploaded to the Internet Archive by user tpb.

The theory of the aether in the seventeenth century -- Electric and magnetic science, prior to the introduction of the potentials -- Galvanism, from Galvani to Ohm -- The luminiferous medium, from Bradley to Fresnel -- The aether as an elastic solid -- Faraday -- The mathematical electricians of the middle of the nineteenth century -- Maxwell -- Models of the aether -- The followers of Maxwell -- Conduction in solutions and gases, from Faraday to J.J. Thomson -- The theory of aether and electrons in the closing years of the nineteenth century
docs.title: A history of the theories of aether and electricity : from the age of Descartes to the close of the nineteenth century
